titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Shihab Ibn Abd Rabbih
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Shihab Ibn Abd Rabbih

segments: ه عن شهاب بن عبد ربّه فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن أحمد بن محمّد بن عيسى، عن الحسن بن محبوب، عن شهاب بن عبد ربّه‌.
arabic.text: ه عن شهاب بن عبد ربّه فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن أحمد بن محمّد بن عيسى، عن الحسن بن محبوب، عن شهاب بن عبد ربّه‌.

segments: Everything in this book that is narrated from Shihab ibn Abd Rabbih has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Sad ibn Abdullah, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Isa, from Al-Hasan ibn Mahbub, from Shihab ibn Abd Rabbih.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Everything in this book that is narrated from Shihab ibn Abd Rabbih has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Sad ibn Abdullah, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Isa, from Al-Hasan ibn Mahbub, from Shihab ibn Abd Rabbih.
